name: Taito
description: Japanese arcade developer and publisher known for Space Invaders, Bubble Bobble, Arkanoid, Darius, and Puzzle Bobble.

eras.title: Arcade Foundation
eras.description: Pre-Space Invaders amusement and arcade-machine period.

eras.title: Space Invaders Era
eras.description: Taito's global arcade breakthrough and early video-game dominance.

eras.title: Bubble Bobble and Darius Era
eras.description: Character-driven arcade games, shooters, and puzzle-action classics.

eras.title: Square Enix Era
eras.description: Modern period as a Square Enix subsidiary focused on arcade operations, legacy games, and selective releases.

notes: Currently under Square Enix, but kept major because Taito is a historically major arcade company.
